race.description: Tomakin Sports & Social Club Mothers Day Cup Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: Tricky race. STAR BLING (2) tough mare deep into her prep. Back in trip last start with a plugging third over 1605m at the Sapphire Coast. Can take a sit from the draw and look for her closing late. I DOUBT IT (6) racing in career best form and expect to see her a little closer in the run today. Rounded them up effortlessly with a sharp win over 1605m at the Sapphire Coast four weeks ago. Well placed with the extra weight and there is no reason she cannot score again. REVOKE (11) good Maiden winner first-up, then snagged back from the awkward gate with a battling eleventh over 1200m at Wagga. Fitter now and he gets a better set-up today. Each way. PERUNO (1) eye-catching return when third over 1700m at Wellington. Gets weight relief with the claim and saves his best for this track and trip. Respect. SURE INTENTIONS (3) much better performance at latest and can run the mile today.
